---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Describe the frustration or gap.

## Proposed Solution

How would you like this to work?

## Alternatives Considered

Have you tried any workarounds? Are there other approaches?

## Additional Context

Screenshots, mockups, links to similar features in other tools, etc.
